'''Bas''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] serving as wing [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Biography==
Bas had a rather crude nature and blunt attitude towards situations made him a "sore thumb" amongst the more cultured bearings of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Starfleet]], something for which he would be regarded with something of disdain by the officers of the ''Chimaera'' but would be appreciated and approved by then-[[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Imperial Fleet]], during his bid for a [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|treaty of peace]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Though trained in [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], the disintegrating state in which the Imperial Remnant found itself prior to the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty]]—and the legalization of open trade between the two rival parties—forced Colonel Bas to include [[Preybird-class starfighter|''Preybird''-class starfighters]] in his fighter wing. Despite misgivings about the usefulness of such craft, Bas personally witnessed their effectiveness in a skirmish with hostile pirates claiming to be [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] where, following Paelleon's orders, he used his starfighters to effectively execute an [[A-wing Slash/Legends|A-wing Slash]].
